_about: BLIP-large captions for the 12 Phase 4.6 SUPIR/HYPIR head-to-head images. Generated for documentation + an optional side experiment comparing generic-prompt vs rich-caption on SUPIR. Our main head-to-head uses the generic prompt 'a high-resolution photograph, sharp detail, professional quality' to match Phase 2 / Phase 4c eval conditions.

captions.Landscape_Grain.jpg: there is a black and white photo of a plane flying over a forest
captions.Street_Hindi_Text.jpg: there are two people riding on a motorcycle down the street
captions.Dubai_fine-arch.jpg: araffled skyscrapers in a city with a blue sky
captions.Yosemite_Falls.jpg: there is a waterfall that is flowing down a mountain side
captions.Cat_Eyes-hf-texture.jpg: a close up of a cat ' s blue eye with a map in the background
captions.Yosemite_Valley.jpg: there is a view of a valley with a waterfall in the distance
captions.Notre_Dame_Fine-Arch.jpg: arafed image of a large building with statues on the front
captions.Forest_hf-texture.jpg: sunlight shining through the trees in a forest with moss
captions.Landscape_Reflection.jpg: arafed view of a waterfall in the distance with a grassy field below
captions.landscape_night.jpg: a view of a full moon over a forest with a few trees
captions.Owl.jpg: there is a owl that is flying over a field of grass
